scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix packages/contracts install && npm --prefix packages/config install && npm --prefix apps/api install && npm --prefix apps/web install && npm --prefix apps/ops install
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:windows: start /B npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:ops"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/api run test && npm --prefix apps/web run test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.prisma:generate:all: npm run prisma:generate && node node_modules/.bin/prisma generate --schema prisma/dossiers/schema.prisma
scripts.seed:geo: npm run seed:geo:regions && npm run seed:geo:provinces && npm run seed:geo:communes
scripts.citurbarea:start: npx concurrently "npm run docker:up" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.citurbarea:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run seed:geo
